description_i18n.zh-TW: 依法院、案件類別、年份篩選後,以折線圖呈現案件量逐年趨勢,示範 aggregate_dataset MCP 工具的群組/聚合查詢模式。內建 2020–2024 共五年示範資料,正式版需連線到載入司法院統計資料的後端。
description_i18n.en: Filter by court, case type, and year range; an SVG line chart shows case-count trends per year — the aggregate_dataset MCP-tool group-by pattern visualised. Ships with five years (2020–2024) of illustrative data; production needs a Judicial Yuan statistics dataset loaded server-side.
